description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named PlatformIO CI that runs on every push to master and development branches and on pull requests. Use a matrix strategy to build on ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macos-latest, caching pip and PlatformIO dependencies. For each job, check out the repository, set up Python 3.9.13, install and upgrade PlatformIO, copy necessary configuration files, and run PlatformIO.
